artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2024-08-28
artifacts.excerpt: My PRNG algorithm: Seed with the number of seconds in the current time (treat 0 as 60). Take the tens place times 3 and the ones place times 7, and add those together. Yield the ones digit of the sum. Repeat using the sum as the new seed until you have as many digits as you want. https://t.co/FXfUHnXh6L
